inputs.label: Annual Salary
inputs.businessContext: Base salary paid to employee per year. Standard HR practice.

inputs.label: Bonus Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Annual bonus as percentage of salary. Common in compensation packages.

inputs.label: Benefits Cost
inputs.businessContext: Health insurance, retirement contributions, etc. Typical range 30-40% of salary.

inputs.label: Payroll Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Social Security and Medicare taxes (FICA). US standard 7.65%.

inputs.label: Training Cost
inputs.businessContext: Annual training expenses per employee. Industry benchmark varies.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Facilities, utilities, admin support. Common allocation method.

inputs.label: Working Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Standard workdays excluding weekends and holidays.

inputs.label: Productivity Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of paid time actually productive. Lean metric.

thresholds.productivityRate < 70: Low productivity warning: consider process improvement.
thresholds.overheadRate > 50: High overhead: review allocation or reduce costs.
thresholds.benefitsCost > 0.4 * annualSalary: Benefits cost exceeds 40% of salary: benchmark against industry.

formulas.totalAnnualCost: annualSalary + (annualSalary * bonusPercentage / 100) + benefitsCost + (annualSalary * payrollTaxRate / 100) + trainingCost + equipmentCost + (annualSalary * overheadRate / 100)

suggestedActions: If productivity low: implement Lean or Six Sigma.
If overhead high: review indirect costs.
